---
title: "MyOpenMath Embedded Question Hash Checker"
format: 
  live-html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .btn-exercise-solution { display: none !important; }
        </style>
    webr:
      packages:
        - dplyr
        - jsonlite
        - base64enc
        - kableExtra
      cell-options: 
        persist: false
    live:
      show-solutions: true
---

{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

:::{.callout-note}
## About
This page allows students and instructors to verify the results encoded in a MyOpenMath question hash. Paste a hash into the code cell below to see a transparent summary of the scores it encodes, including per-question part breakdowns, decimal scores, and overall activity summaries.
:::

```{webr}
#| context: setup
#| echo: false
#| output: false

library(jsonlite)
library(base64enc)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)

decode <- function(hash) {
  fromJSON(rawToChar(base64decode(hash)))
}

process_mom_questions <- function(hash) {
  decoded <- decode(hash)
  notebook <- decoded$notebook
  questions <- decoded$questions

  q_names <- names(questions)
  n <- length(q_names)

  raw_scores   <- character(n)
  parts_total  <- integer(n)
  parts_correct <- numeric(n)
  score        <- numeric(n)
  result       <- character(n)

  for (i in seq_along(q_names)) {
    q <- questions[[q_names[i]]]
    if (q$result == "unattempted") {
      raw_scores[i]    <- "unattempted"
      parts_total[i]   <- NA_integer_
      parts_correct[i] <- NA_real_
      score[i]         <- NA_real_
      result[i]        <- "unattempted"
    } else {
      raw_scores[i]    <- q$raw_scores
      parts_total[i]   <- q$parts_total
      parts_correct[i] <- q$parts_correct
      score[i]         <- round(q$score, 4)
      result[i]        <- q$result
    }
  }

  tibble(
    notebook      = notebook,
    question      = q_names,
    raw_scores    = raw_scores,
    parts_total   = parts_total,
    parts_correct = parts_correct,
    score         = score,
    result        = result
  )
}

summarise_mom_questions <- function(df) {
  attempted <- df |> filter(result != "unattempted")
  
  total_parts         <- sum(attempted$parts_total, na.rm = TRUE)
  total_correct       <- sum(attempted$parts_correct, na.rm = TRUE)
  overall_by_parts    <- if (total_parts > 0) round(total_correct / total_parts, 4) else NA_real_
  overall_by_mean     <- if (nrow(attempted) > 0) round(mean(attempted$score, na.rm = TRUE), 4) else NA_real_
  n_attempted         <- nrow(attempted)
  n_total             <- nrow(df)
  n_fully_correct     <- sum(attempted$result == "fully_correct")
  n_partial           <- sum(attempted$result == "partially_correct")
  n_incorrect         <- sum(attempted$result == "incorrect")

  tibble(
    notebook                   = df$notebook[1],
    questions_attempted        = paste0(n_attempted, " of ", n_total),
    fully_correct              = n_fully_correct,
    partially_correct          = n_partial,
    incorrect                  = n_incorrect,
    total_parts_correct        = total_correct,
    total_parts_possible       = total_parts,
    overall_score_by_parts     = overall_by_parts,
    overall_score_by_mean      = overall_by_mean
  )
}
```

### MyOpenMath Question Hash Check

Paste the hash from the `Question Hash` box near the end of the activity between the quotes (`""`) on line 1, then click `Run Code`.

```{webr}
mom_hash <- ""

df <- process_mom_questions(mom_hash)

cat("Activity:", df$notebook[1], "\n\n")

cat("--- Per-Question Results ---\n")
df |>
  select(question, parts_total, parts_correct, score, result) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Question", "Parts Total", "Parts Correct", "Score", "Result")) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{webr}
cat("--- Activity Summary ---\n")
summarise_mom_questions(df) |>
  select(-notebook) |>
  kable(col.names = c(
    "Attempted", "Fully Correct", "Partially Correct", "Incorrect",
    "Parts Correct", "Parts Possible", "Score (by parts)", "Score (by mean)"
  )) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```
